dhp116-128:1.0.116: Abhittharetha kalyāṇe,pāpā cittaṁ nivāraye;Dandhañhi karoto puññaṁ,pāpasmiṁ ramatī mano.
dhp116-128:1.0.117: Pāpañce puriso kayirā,Na naṁ kayirā punappunaṁ;Na tamhi chandaṁ kayirātha,Dukkho pāpassa uccayo.
dhp116-128:1.0.118: Puññañce puriso kayirā,kayirā naṁ punappunaṁ;Tamhi chandaṁ kayirātha,sukho puññassa uccayo.
dhp116-128:1.0.119: Pāpopi passati bhadraṁ,Yāva pāpaṁ na paccati;Yadā ca paccati pāpaṁ,Atha pāpo pāpāni passati.
dhp116-128:1.0.120: Bhadropi passati pāpaṁ,Yāva bhadraṁ na paccati;Yadā ca paccati bhadraṁ,Atha bhadro bhadrāni passati.
dhp116-128:1.0.121: Māvamaññetha pāpassa,na mantaṁ āgamissati;Udabindunipātena,udakumbhopi pūrati;Bālo pūrati pāpassa,thokaṁ thokampi ācinaṁ.
dhp116-128:1.0.122: Māvamaññetha puññassa,na mandaṁ āgamissati;Udabindunipātena,udakumbhopi pūrati;Dhīro pūrati puññassa,thokaṁ thokampi ācinaṁ.
dhp116-128:1.0.123: Vāṇijova bhayaṁ maggaṁ,appasattho mahaddhano;Visaṁ jīvitukāmova,pāpāni parivajjaye.
dhp116-128:1.0.124: Pāṇimhi ce vaṇo nāssa,hareyya pāṇinā visaṁ;Nābbaṇaṁ visamanveti,natthi pāpaṁ akubbato.
dhp116-128:1.0.125: Yo appaduṭṭhassa narassa dussati,Suddhassa posassa anaṅgaṇassa;Tameva bālaṁ pacceti pāpaṁ,Sukhumo rajo paṭivātaṁva khitto.
dhp116-128:1.0.126: Gabbhameke uppajjanti,nirayaṁ pāpakammino;Saggaṁ sugatino yanti,parinibbanti anāsavā.
dhp116-128:1.0.127: Na antalikkhe na samuddamajjhe,Na pabbatānaṁ vivaraṁ pavissa;Na vijjatī so jagatippadeso,Yatthaṭṭhito mucceyya pāpakammā.
dhp116-128:1.0.128: Na antalikkhe na samuddamajjhe,Na pabbatānaṁ vivaraṁ pavissa;Na vijjatī so jagatippadeso,Yatthaṭṭhitaṁ nappasaheyya maccu.
